src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/dto/Failu.general_idea: Replace complex collection-based error fields with simple string fields for error code and message.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/dto/Failu.human_impl: Changed 'private List<String> error' and 'private Map<String, String> fieldError' to 'private String errorCode' and 'private String message'.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/dto/Succe.general_idea: Change message field from List<String> to String to simplify the DTO structure.
Remove the dataMap field as it is no longer needed in this DTO.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/dto/repon.general_idea: Changed the dateOfBirth field type from LocalDate to Instant to support timestamp precision.
